subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Bear thou witness in thy soul that He is the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the Beauteous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله ان اشهدی فی روحک بانه هو المقتدر العزیز الجمیل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement
